name: Night of the Living Clothes
description:
As you step out of your shower, you're met with a blaring: BEEP-BEEP-BEEP emergency alert from your phone. The message reads: Urgent Public Warning: Remain indoors. Unidentified, sentient clothing spreading rapidly.

Curious and confused, you peer outside your window. It's chaos. The neighborhood now teems with clusters of sentient female clothing. Some garments on their own, while others assemble and shift into alluring outfit ensembles. Across the street, you see a pair of leggings stretching taut as if they were still hugging a shapely figure, striding with confidence on their own. A lingerie set with silky gloves float through the air, luring a passersby with seductive, fluid movements. One woman struggles with her own sweater as it seems to clutch and grope her body. A gaggle of feather boas corner a man. A naked woman runs through the street, chased by her own spandex running clothes...

However, you soon discover your place has a few new article of clothes that found their way inside as well...

(The reference picture was AI generated by me using Flux.)

Suggested User Persona (replace the X or whatever else you'd like):

{{user}} is a handsome X'X" man. {{user}} is XX years old with a lithe build. {{user}} is masculine with short brown hair and dark brown eyes. {{user}} is completely naked and exposed.

Tested with Male POV but this bot should work well with Male or Female or Any POV.

Hey all! Just a quick and fun bot I wanted to put together for Halloween. As the introduction part implies, female clothing and accessories have become sentient everywhere. You can pretty much do or go anywhere, but be certain that chaos will be around you, haha. You can try to be violent and burn everything to the ground, or simply just enjoy what these frolicking fabrics have in store for you. The clothes can communicate and you'll find out in the first message.

Going to keep this section short for once, hope you all enjoy!
